manifest.name: NN Bridge

name: NN Bridge

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Removed all `!important` CSS overrides in the Notion-style sidebar tabs (replaced with higher-specificity selectors)
- Release assets are now built and attested via GitHub Actions (artifact attestations / build provenance)

releases.author: Maws7140
releases.description:
Initial release of NN Bridge.

A companion plugin for Notebook Navigator: visual hide toggles, layout overrides, command shortcuts, recents filtering, sidebar markdown embed, Notion-like sidebar tabs, and custom collapsible sections.

Requires the Notebook Navigator plugin.
